title: Free Space Management in Secondary Storage
description: A flowchart illustrating the processes and data structures involved in allocating and tracking free blocks on a storage device.
elements: Allocation Algorithm (e.g., First Fit, Best Fit)
relationships: A request triggers a search of the free-space list
The allocation algorithm selects a block based on strategy
The chosen block is allocated and marked as used
The free-space list data structure is updated to reflect the change
